General.Name: Longhui International Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Longhui International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the hotpot restaurant business in the People's Republic of China. The company owns and operates restaurants under the Faigo and Xiao Faigo Hotpot brands. Longhui International Holdings Limited is based in Central, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Queen?s Road Centre, Central, Hong Kong
